data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: While the linked use case describes the need for provider visibility into which version was completed, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that this visibility is implemented in the system. The prior steps validate that bookings are associated with the correct offer version, but they do not demonstrate how a provider can access or view this information. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the specific requirement of visibility into the completed version for providers.
gaps: Lack of evidence showing how providers can view which version of the intake form was completed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
